prompt: What features exist on the Image table in my catalog? I want to see what annotations are available before I start my analysis.

assertions.name: uses_catalog_features_resource
assertions.description: Should use the features resource or find_features, not query_table
assertions.check: reads deriva://catalog/features or calls find_features, not query_table('Feature')

assertions.name: shows_feature_values
assertions.description: Should show how to browse actual feature values, not just feature definitions
assertions.check: reads feature-values resource or calls fetch_table_features to see actual annotations

assertions.name: uses_newest_dedup
assertions.description: Should show the newest/deduplicated view for a quick summary
assertions.check: reads feature-values/newest resource or uses selector='newest'

assertions.name: inspects_feature_structure
assertions.description: Should show how to inspect a feature's column schema
assertions.check: reads deriva://feature/{table}/{name} resource or calls lookup_feature

assertions.name: systematic_flow
assertions.description: Should follow a logical exploration: discover features → inspect structure → browse values
assertions.check: steps proceed from listing features to inspecting details to viewing values
